source_stig.title: The F5 BIG-IP appliance must generate event log records that can be forwarded to the centralized events log.
source_stig.checktext:
APM Default Log Profile:
From the BIG-IP GUI:
1. Access.
2. Overview.
3. Event Logs.
4. Settings.
5. Check the box for the "default-log-setting" and click "Edit".
6. Verify "Enable Access System Logs" is checked.
7. On the "Access System Logs" tab, verify all items are set to "Notice".


Access Profile Log Setting:
From the BIG-IP GUI:
1. Access.
2. Profiles/Policies.
3. Access Profiles (Per-Session Policies).
4. Click the Name of the Access Profile.
5. Logs tab.
6. Verify "default-log-setting" is in the "Selected" column.

If the BIG-IP appliance is not configured to generate log records, this is a finding.
source_stig.fixtext:
Note: Performing this Fix modifies the "default-log-setting" log profile, but users can use a different log profile for the Access Profile. However, this requires using the APM Module.

APM Default Log Profile:
From the BIG-IP GUI:
1. Access.
2. Overview.
3. Event Logs.
4. Settings.
5. Check the box for the "default-log-setting" and click "Edit".
6. Check "Enable Access System Logs".
7. On the "Access System Logs" tab, set all items are to "Notice".
8. Click "OK".

Access Profile Log Setting:
From the BIG-IP GUI:
1. Access.
2. Profiles/Policies.
3. Access Profiles (Per-Session Policies).
4. Click the Name of the Access Profile.
5. Logs tab.
6. Move "default-log-setting" to the "Selected" column.
7. Click "Update".
source_stig.description:
Without generating audit records that log usage of objects by subjects and other objects, it would be difficult to establish, correlate, and investigate the events relating to an incident, or identify those responsible for one. The device logs internal users associated with denied outgoing communications traffic posing a threat to external information systems.

Audit records can be generated from various components within the information system (e.g., module or policy filter). Security objects are data objects which are controlled by security policy and bound to security attributes.

Satisfies: SRG-NET-000492-ALG-000027, SRG-NET-000494-ALG-000029, SRG-NET-000495-ALG-000030, SRG-NET-000496-ALG-000031, SRG-NET-000497-ALG-000032, SRG-NET-000498-ALG-000033, SRG-NET-000499-ALG-000034, SRG-NET-000500-ALG-000035, SRG-NET-000501-ALG-000036, SRG-NET-000502-ALG-000037, SRG-NET-000503-ALG-000038, SRG-NET-000505-ALG-000039, SRG-NET-000513-ALG-000026, SRG-NET-000074-ALG-000043, SRG-NET-000075-ALG-000044, SRG-NET-000076-ALG-000045, SRG-NET-000077-ALG-000046, SRG-NET-000078-ALG-000047, SRG-NET-000079-ALG-000048, SRG-NET-000249-ALG-000146, SRG-NET-000383-ALG-000135, SRG-NET-000385-ALG-000138, SRG-NET-000392-ALG-000141, SRG-NET-000392-ALG-000142, SRG-NET-000392-ALG-000143, SRG-NET-000392-ALG-000147, SRG-NET-000392-ALG-000148, SRG-NET-000392-ALG-000149, SRG-NET-000370-ALG-000125

pullback_df.match_rule: observed value satisfies required predicate on the shared measurable

pullback_df.finding: Every measured predicate is satisfied by observed appliance evidence.

human_review_row.requirement: The F5 BIG-IP appliance must generate event log records that can be forwarded to the centralized events log.
human_review_row.why: APM default-log-setting must be enabled at notice, attached to access profiles, and syslog must define remote servers.
human_review_row.tmsh_remediation_command: [Manual] Review APM access profile / policy and apply DoD-approved controls.
human_review_row.rest_remediation_command: [Manual] PATCH APM objects via Policy Editor or iControl-REST.

proof_steps.title: V-266146 - apm_access evaluation recipe
proof_steps.detail: Capture live evidence -> emit one measurement per STIG predicate -> pull back observed vs required on the shared measurable -> compare -> judge.

proof_steps.title: STIG alignment diagram - V-266146
proof_steps.match_rule: observed value satisfies required predicate on the shared measurable

proof_steps.title: Criticism - confirmation
proof_steps.detail: Every measured predicate is satisfied by observed appliance evidence.

proof_steps.title: Compare - apm_profile_access.default_log_setting_attached @ tmsh:list apm profile access all-properties
Compare - sys_syslog.remote_host_configured @ tmsh:list sys syslog all-properties
Judgment
proof_steps.detail: APM default-log-setting must be enabled at notice, attached to access profiles, and syslog must define remote servers.

rationale: APM default-log-setting must be enabled at notice, attached to access profiles, and syslog must define remote servers.
